title: casearia littoralis
intro: Casearia littoralis, also known as the coastal casearia, is a tropical plant species that belongs to the family Salicaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The health benefits of Casearia littoralis include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and promoting wound healing. The plant can be used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are often consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
